---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new action or capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What are you trying to do that Tapium doesn't support today?**

**What would the action's JSON shape look like?**

```json
{"action": "your_new_action", "...": "..."}
```

**Have you checked the "Design notes" / "What this is not" sections of the
README?** Tapium deliberately stays a thin, single-file, app-agnostic
device-control layer — please say a word about how this fits that scope
(or whether it's better suited as something built on top of Tapium
instead of inside it).
